title: stipa roylei
intro: Stipa roylei, also known as Royle's feather grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stipa roylei include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, and can also be applied topically as a paste or powder to treat various skin conditions.
